subcodes.first_line: This is Our remembrance unto Our servant, that he may follow guidance in the days of his Lord, the Sovereign of the Throne and of earth, and preserve him from insinuations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبدنا لیتبع الهدی فی ایام ربه مالک العرش و الثری و یحفظه من اشارات
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @blind imitation [taqlid], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
